name: Definium Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Definium Therapeutics is a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company developing novel product candidates to treat brain health disorders, including generalized anxiety disorder (GAD), major depressive disorder (MDD), and autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Its lead product candidates are DT120 ODT (lysergide D-tartrate) for GAD and MDD, and DT402 (R(-)-MDMA) for ASD.

exposures.sentence: We are a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company developing novel product candidates to treat brain health disorders.

catalysts.event: Topline readout of Voyage Phase 3 trial for GAD (Part A)
catalysts.sentence: In December 2024, we announced the initiation of Voyage, and we anticipate a topline readout (Part A results) in early third quarter 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline readout of Panorama Phase 3 trial for GAD (Part A)
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we announced the initiation of Panorama with an anticipated topline readout (Part A results) in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline readout of Emerge Phase 3 trial for MDD (Part A)
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we announced the initiation of Emerge, and we anticipate a topline readout (Part A results) in late second quarter 2026.

catalysts.event: First patient dosed in Ascend Phase 3 trial for MDD
catalysts.sentence: We activated initial sites in our second Phase 3 clinical trial of DT120 ODT in MDD, Ascend (DT120-311), in the first quarter of 2026 and we expect to dose our first patient in this trial by early second quarter 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Phase 2a trial of DT402 in ASD
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate initial data from our Phase 2a study in 2026.

tamClaims.claim: GAD affects approximately 10% of U.S. adults in their lifetimes.
tamClaims.sentence: GAD is a chronic, often debilitating mental health disorder that affects approximately 10% of U.S. adults in their lifetimes.

tamClaims.claim: As of 2023, 15.5% of U.S. adults had experienced MDD in the previous twelve months.
tamClaims.sentence: As of 2023, it was estimated that 15.5% of adults in the U.S. had experienced MDD in the previous twelve months

tamClaims.claim: Prevalence of ASD in Europe, Asia, and the United States ranges from 2 to 25 per 1000, or approximately 1 in 40 to 1 in 500.
tamClaims.sentence: The overall prevalence of ASD in Europe, Asia, and the United States ranges from 2 to 25 per 1000, or approximately 1 in 40 to 1 in 500.
